Nadi Rectification 77
We will note some examples to see how far these tables
work. The day begins with Sunrise only.
1. Alan Leo. 5.49 A.M on Aug 7, 1860 at London. It was a
Tuesday and the Sunrise was at 4.39 A.M. The birth was one
hour and ten minutes after Sunrise. Adding this to our start
ing point 6.00 A.M., we get 7.10 A.M. Against 25 in our Table
Revati is in a fixed sign at 7.14 A.M. Alan Leo's birth should be
at 5.53 A.M. It shows Male or Female.
2. Mahatma Gandhi, 1869.10.2 at 7.10 A.M. Saturday Sun
rise 5.50, Lagna Libra, and Aslesha. The birth was after 4.30.
Adding this to our starting point we get 7.14.30. Under 27 we
get 7.19 and the birth ought to be that of a male. The system
